data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Due-date reminders' but failed to provide any evidence confirming that this feature is implemented or functioning. The linked use case mentions due-date reminders as a need, but there are no specific API reads or persisted state checks provided to demonstrate that this requirement is covered. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the evidence does not support the existence or functionality of due-date reminders.
gaps: No evidence of implementation or functionality for due-date reminders.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
